tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
     Things fall apart[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
And time breaks your heart[/tab]

I wasn't there but I know
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
     She was your girl[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
You showed her the world[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You fell out of love and you both let go[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm7[/ch]
She was cryin’ on my shoulder[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
All I could do was hold her[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Only made us closer until July[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Now I know that you love me[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
You don't need to remind me[/tab]
                               N.C.
I should put it all behind me, shouldn't I?


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But I see her in the back of my mind all the time[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]B7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
Like a fever, like I'm burning alive, like a sign[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Did I cross the line?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
(Mm) Hmm[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
     Well, good things don't last[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
And life moves so fast[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
I'd never ask who was better[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
'Cause she couldn't be[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
More different from me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Happy and free in leather[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And I know that you love me[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
You don't need to remind me[/tab]

Wanna put it all behind me, but baby


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I see her in the back of my mind all the time[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]B7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
Feels like a fever, like I'm burning alive, like a sign[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Did I cross the line?[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]([ch]Cmaj7[/ch])        ([ch]D[/ch])       
You say no one knows you so well (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Valentine's Day, cryin’ in the hotel[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself[/tab]

And I wonder
[tab]    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
Do you see her in the back of your mind in my eyes[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You say no one knows you so well[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Valentine's Day, cryin’ in the hotel[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B7[/ch]                           N.C.
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself[/tab]
